description_long: This object is a compact, semi-automatic handgun with a polymer frame and a matte black finish. The slide is rectangular with subtle bevels along the edges and features both front and rear iron sights. The grip is ergonomically contoured, with a textured surface for improved handling and a visible magazine base at the bottom. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement and added safety. The barrel is short and flush with the slide, with no visible threading or compensator. Minimalistic markings are present on the slide, contributing to a utilitarian and modern appearance.
description: A compact, matte black semi-automatic handgun with a textured ergonomic grip, rectangular slide, and minimalistic markings.
description_view_0: The muzzle end of the handgun is visible, showing the barrel opening, front sight, and the squared-off slide profile.
description_view_1: The left side reveals the full slide, ejection port, trigger, trigger guard, and the contoured grip with visible texturing.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back of the slide, rear sight, and the grip's backstrap, highlighting the symmetry and alignment of the sights.
description_view_3: The right side shows the slide, trigger guard, and grip, with subtle details of the magazine base and slide serrations.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is compact and ergonomically contoured, featuring a stippled texture for enhanced traction and control. Its surface appears to be made of matte black polymer, with subtle finger grooves and a slight palm swell for comfort. The lower portion of the grip integrates a visible magazine base, and there are no prominent logos or embellishments. The backstrap is gently curved, and the overall design prioritizes secure handling and minimal slippage.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement and gloved use. It has a smooth, untextured finish and a slight undercut at the rear for improved grip ergonomics. The guard is robust, with no squared-off edges or integrated accessories, and its design is functional and streamlined.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and flush with the front of the slide, exhibiting a standard profile with no visible threading, porting, or compensator. Its exterior is finished in matte black, matching the slide, and there are no external markings or embellishments on the barrel itself.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features minimalistic markings, with faint engravings that may indicate the manufacturer or model, though they are not clearly legible in the images. These markings are located on the left side of the slide, near the ejection port, and are subtle in style, blending with the matte finish.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly beveled, extending just beyond the bottom of the grip. It is constructed from the same matte black polymer as the grip, with no finger rest, flaring, or visible logos. The design is simple and functional, providing a flush fit with the grip.
